description: HP 8508A Vector Voltmeter with HP-IB interface. Measures channel A/B voltage and power, B/A magnitude ratio and B-A phase, transmission, group delay, SWR, reflection coefficient (rho), admittance (Y) and impedance (Z) from 100 kHz to 2 GHz. Uses an IEEE 488.2 mnemonic (SCPI-like) command set.

commands.name: averaging_count
commands.description: Sets the averaging value. The number of internal readings averaged per result is 2 raised to the power of this count. Higher values reduce measurement variation at the cost of a lower rate. Changeable only via HP-IB.

commands.name: calibration
commands.description: Performs an internal device calibration. Returns 0 for success, 1 if the calibration fails.

commands.name: capability
commands.description: Returns the instrument's HP-IB capability string: SH1, AH1, T6, TE0, L4, LE0, SR1, RL1, PP0, DC1, DT1, C0, E2.

commands.name: clear_status
commands.description: Clears the contents of the status register and associated status data structures. Used as part of a remote instrument preset.

commands.name: configure_measurement
commands.description: Configures the measurement(s) the Vector Voltmeter will make and return in response to a measurement query. Default is AVOLtage. Options for <meas> are the same as the Measure command.

parameters.name: meas
parameters.range: AVOLtage | BVOLtage | APOWer | BPOWer | BA | PHASe | TRANsmission | DELay | SWR | RHO | Y | Z | CORE (comma-separated list allowed)

commands.name: correction_data_a
commands.description: Sends data to the Vector Voltmeter for use as the channel A normalization (reference) value. Defining reference data is available only from HP-IB.

commands.name: correction_data_b
commands.description: Sends data to the Vector Voltmeter for use as the channel B normalization (reference) value.

commands.name: correction_data_phase
commands.description: Sends data to the Vector Voltmeter for use as the phase normalization (reference) value.

commands.name: correction_impedance
commands.description: Sets the impedance normalization function. ON (1) normalizes impedance measurements; OFF (0) calculates impedance from the current Input Impedance value. Default OFF.

commands.name: correction_termination
commands.description: Sets the termination standard used for reflection measurements. Default SHORT. Query returns the current setting as an ASCII string.

commands.name: correction_perform
commands.description: Sets the :A, :B and :PHASe references to be the current measurement values (saves current measurement as a reference).

commands.name: correction_state
commands.description: Defines whether the correction (normalization) function is in use. ON (1) or OFF (0). Default OFF.

commands.name: direct_analog_output
commands.description: Sets the Vector Voltmeter to operate as a simple converter. Frequency and amplitude ranges are locked and rear panel outputs represent the A or B voltage and the phase difference. No results are available over HP-IB in this mode. Default OFF.

commands.name: display_state
commands.description: Controls the front panel display. Turning the display off can improve measurement speed. Default ON.

commands.name: fetch
commands.description: Returns the result of the most recently started measurement as soon as it is available, using the current measurement configuration.

commands.name: fetch_continuous
commands.description: Causes results to be passed to HP-IB such that when one is read, the next is made available for reading as soon as it is calculated.

commands.name: format
commands.description: Sets the units in which measurement results are returned. LINear: volts/watts/dimensionless ratio. LOGarithmic: dBuV/dBm/dB/Return Loss. POLar: ratio and phase angle. RECTangular/CARTesian: real and imaginary components. Default LINear POLar.

commands.name: frequency_band
commands.description: Selects the frequency band of the lock circuits explicitly and forces FREQ:BAND:AUTO OFF. Bands 1-15 cover 0.1 MHz to 2000 MHz; band 20 covers 0.02 to 0.02 MHz. Explicit selection minimizes lock time. Default is automatic.

commands.name: frequency_band_auto
commands.description: Selects automatic or explicit frequency band selection. Band 20 will not be auto-selected. When turned OFF the instrument remains in the current band. Default ON, forced OFF when FREQ:BAND is received.

commands.name: identification
commands.description: Returns a string describing the Vector Voltmeter and Input Module: Manufacturer, Model number (with input module option STD or 050), unused field, and firmware revision. E.g. HEWLETT-PACKARD,8508A-050,0,REV 2944.

commands.name: input_impedance
commands.description: Sets the impedance of the measurement system, used in power and impedance measurements. Allowed values are 50 or 75 ohms.

commands.name: input_pod
commands.description: Returns the input module (pod) type: 50, 75, or none.

commands.name: measure
commands.description: Configures and makes a measurement (or measurements) and returns the result(s). Default AVOLtage. Multiple measurements may be requested as a comma-separated list. Results also depend on CORRection:STATe.

parameters.name: meas
parameters.range: AVOLtage (Ch A voltage) | BVOLtage (Ch B voltage) | APOWer (Ch A power) | BPOWer (Ch B power) | BA (B/A magnitude ratio) | PHASe (B-A phase) | TRANsmission (B/A ratio and B-A phase) | DELay | SWR | RHO (reflection coefficient) | Y (admittance 1/Z) | Z (impedance) | CORE (AVOL,BVOL,PHASE)

commands.name: measure_timeout
commands.description: Allows a measurement to time out if the instrument has not locked to a signal. Default 30 seconds.

commands.name: measure_timeout_state
commands.description: Defines whether the measurement timeout function is in use. ON (1) or OFF (0).

commands.name: output_test_signal
commands.description: Controls the front panel Test output signal. Default OFF.

commands.name: operation_complete
commands.description: Causes the Operation Complete bit in the Standard Event Status Register to be set when all pending operations are complete. The query form returns 1 when all pending operations have completed.

commands.name: reset
commands.description: Sets the Vector Voltmeter to a front panel state equivalent to pressing PRESET. Has no effect on status registers or results waiting to be read.

commands.name: self_test
commands.description: Initiates an instrument self test and returns a result. 0 indicates no errors; 1 indicates an error occurred.

commands.name: service_request_enable
commands.description: Sets the service request enable conditions. Status Byte bits: 4 Message Available, 5 Standard Event Status Register summary, 7 Operation Status Register summary.

commands.name: standard_event_enable
commands.description: Sets the Standard Event Status Register mask conditions. Query returns the currently selected conditions, range 0 through 255.

commands.name: standard_event_register
commands.description: Returns and clears the current value of the Standard Event Status Register. Bits: 0 Operation Complete, 2 Query Error, 3 Device Error, 4 Execution Error, 5 Command Error.

commands.name: status_byte
commands.description: Returns the current value of the Status Byte with Master Summary Status (MSS) as bit 6. Bits summarize each Status Reporting Structure and are cleared by clearing the related structure.

commands.name: status_operation_condition
commands.description: Returns the current value of the Operation Status Condition register. Bits: 0 Calibrating, 2 Ranging (unlocked), 3 Measuring, 4 Awaiting Trigger.

commands.name: status_operation_event
commands.description: Returns the current value of the Operation Status Event register (events latched by the transition filters).

commands.name: status_operation_enable
commands.description: Selects which latched events (via the positive and negative transition filters) are reported in Status Byte summary bit 7. Query returns 0 through 255.

commands.name: status_operation_ptransition
commands.description: Sets the positive transition filter for the Operation Status register. Query returns the current transition mask.

commands.name: status_operation_ntransition
commands.description: Sets the negative transition filter for the Operation Status register. Query returns the current transition mask.

commands.name: system_error
commands.description: Returns an error code describing any error that occurred, as either a numeric response or a descriptive string. By default a string is returned.

commands.name: system_key
commands.description: Programs front panel key functions to simulate key presses using keycodes 1-20 (1=A, 2=B, 3=REFL MEAS, 4=FORMAT, 5=POWER MEAS, 6=B/A MAG, 7=B-A PHASE, 8=REF SELECT, 9=REF, 10=SYSTEM IMPD, 11=METER SELECT, 12=LOG RANGE, 13=STEP UP, 14=STEP DOWN, 15=MAG RANGE, 16=HOLD VALUE, 17=DISPLAY, 18=SHIFT, 19=LCL, 20=PRESET). Query returns the code of the last key pressed.

commands.name: system_format
commands.description: Sets the HP-IB output format for measurement results. ASCii returns ASCII numeric data; FP64 returns 64-bit IEEE 488.2 floating point numbers.

commands.name: trigger
commands.description: Initiates a new measurement when TRIGger:SOURce is BUS. Performs the same function as the IEEE 488.1 Group Execute Trigger.

commands.name: trigger_source
commands.description: Selects the trigger mode. In FREErun the Vector Voltmeter measures as quickly as possible. With BUS it waits to receive a trigger (*TRG or GET) before initiating the next measurement.

commands.name: wait_to_continue
commands.description: Causes the Vector Voltmeter to complete all current actions before accepting more commands. Used to synchronize the instrument with other equipment.
